name: ticket
description: Turn a rough idea into a precise, well-scoped ticket and file it into a real ticketing system (GitHub Issues, Jira, GitLab, or plain Markdown) through a pluggable provider layer.

interface.shortDescription: Precise tickets, filed into real ticketing systems.
interface.longDescription: Generates a platform-neutral, precision-focused ticket (context, scope in/out, Given/When/Then acceptance criteria, verification) from a rough idea and files it via provider adapters: GitHub Issues, Jira, GitLab, or plain Markdown. Includes dry-run previews, duplicate detection, a read-only setup check, and an optional quality-gate rubric.
